pipeline.reviewNotes: No blocking findings; focused tests and typecheck passed

Export-surface snapshot test confirms no exports lost.

pipeline.inspectNotes: Spec fidelity: delivery.ts snapshots the transcript confirmation target immediately before each deliver attempt, then waits for a new user record before returning success. Constraint compliance: no prohibited patterns or architecture violations in the scoped diff.
